business.description: ShiftPay is a cloud‑native payroll platform built for multi‑unit restaurant groups. It automates tip reporting, overtime calculations, and compliance filing, letting operators focus on the kitchen instead of spreadsheets.

PayBridge is a platform that aims to make cross‑border payouts easier for freelancers in Southeast Asia. We connect local banks and digital wallets to let people get paid in their own currency with fewer headaches.

BuildSpend is a SaaS platform that lets construction subcontractors capture receipts, approve expenses, and sync to their accounting software from the jobsite. It’s built for crews that move fast and need to keep cash flow visible without hiring a full‑time accountant.

Dentipay is a buy‑now‑pay‑later platform built specifically for dental practices. We let patients split expensive procedures into affordable installments while giving clinics a seamless checkout experience and immediate payment flow.

Recoup is a lightweight expense‑reconciliation SaaS built for remote‑first boutique creative agencies. It auto‑captures receipts, converts multi‑currency spend, and pushes approvals straight to Slack, letting tiny finance teams close books without a spreadsheet marathon.

HaulCash is a digital factoring platform built for trucking fleets. We let fleet owners upload any load invoice and receive up to 95% of the amount in their bank account within 24 hours, all through an API that plugs into their existing transportation management system.
TaxChain is a SaaS platform that connects to cryptocurrency exchanges, pulls transaction data and spits out a tax report. We aim to make filing crypto taxes a bit easier for everyday traders.

HedgeLoop is a SaaS platform that gives small importers a simple, automated way to hedge foreign‑exchange risk without the need for a treasury desk. Users can set up rule‑based forward contracts, receive real‑time rate alerts, and let our engine execute trades on their behalf.

FlexBank builds a white‑label banking stack that gig‑platforms can embed directly into their apps – giving drivers, freelancers and on‑demand workers instant access to payroll‑linked accounts, instant payouts and compliance‑ready KYC. The API is designed for rapid integration and scales to millions of active users.

CompliSure is a SaaS platform that automates insurance‑policy compliance for commercial landlords with multiple properties. It pulls policy data from carriers, flags gaps against local fire‑code and liability requirements, and generates the paperwork landlords need to stay covered and avoid costly penalties.

FlowFund is a real‑time treasury platform built specifically for nonprofits. We give finance teams instant visibility into every dollar, automatically sweep idle cash into short‑term, low‑risk investments, and keep compliance paperwork to a minimum. All of it plugs into the accounting tools they already use.

TruckCredit is a platform that aims to simplify the underwriting process for food‑truck operators looking for short‑term loans. We use a mix of alternative data and a lightweight scoring engine to speed up approvals.

BorderWise is a mobile‑first financial‑literacy platform designed for Gen Z immigrants learning to navigate U.S. banking, credit, and taxes. The app combines short video lessons, interactive budgeting tools, and community Q&A in both English and the user’s native language.

RewardLoop is a white‑label card platform that lets SaaS businesses issue virtual and physical cards to their customers and automatically attach customized cash‑back or points rewards to usage. The API plugs into any subscription billing stack so founders can turn churn‑prone users into loyal spenders without building a rewards engine from scratch.

ShiftNest is a micro‑investment app built for hourly workers who get paid each shift. It lets users round‑up every paycheck‑deposit by a few dollars and automatically invest those spare change in low‑fee index funds, all from a mobile‑first interface that works offline.

TheraPay is a lightweight SaaS that lets independent therapists generate single‑click payment links and reconcile them automatically. The tool integrates with practice‑management software and stays HIPAA‑compliant, so clinicians can focus on sessions, not paperwork.

MarketGuard AI is a cloud‑based service that uses machine‑learning models to flag potentially fraudulent transactions on e‑commerce and marketplace platforms. We aim to give sellers a simple dashboard to monitor risk without heavy engineering effort.

ScoreBridge delivers a lightweight API that generates credit scores for thin‑file borrowers using alternative data and a proprietary ML model. We aim to give lenders a quick, inexpensive way to assess risk where traditional credit bureaus fall short.

FlowFund gives Shopify merchants fast, revenue‑based capital so they can scale inventory, marketing, and hiring without giving up equity. Our platform pulls real‑time sales data from the store and offers a funding line that repays automatically as revenue comes in.

LedgerLaw is a SaaS platform that automates accounts‑payable and accounts‑receivable workflows for boutique law firms. It pulls invoice data from email, parses legal billing codes, and syncs with the firm's accounting software without any manual entry.

PesaMaid is a mobile‑first digital wallet built for domestic workers and their employers. We give gig‑based household staff a safe, instant way to receive wages, pay bills, and build savings—all from a phone they already use.

SwitchMate is a lightweight web tool that walks users through the process of moving their primary checking and savings accounts from one bank to another. We aim to simplify the paperwork and reduce the friction that people often complain about when they decide to switch banks.

FlowCart is a lightweight SaaS that lets independent corner stores forecast daily cash‑flow using their POS data and a handful of simple rules. The tool surfaces short‑term liquidity gaps so owners can time inventory orders and short‑term financing more confidently.

NurseNest is a web‑app that lets registered nurses refinance their student loans with rates that are tied to their employment sector and projected salary growth. We pull payroll data from hospitals in real time so nurses can see what a new payment plan would look like before they apply.

DealFlow Syndicate is a lightweight SaaS platform that lets angel investors create, manage, and close syndicates without the paperwork nightmare. It automates legal docs, capital calls, and post‑deal reporting so angels can focus on sourcing deals, not admin.

Withholdly automates tax‑withholding for independent contractors and gig workers, pulling real‑time earnings data from platforms like Upwork, Stripe, and Square to calculate and remit the correct federal and state taxes. The service eliminates manual spreadsheet work and the risk of under‑withholding penalties, letting contractors focus on billable work.
EventSure is a platform that lets event planners add short‑term insurance coverage to any gig with a few clicks. We aim to make risk management as easy as ordering a venue or catering service.

CrossBorderPay is a low‑cost digital rails platform that lets Ethiopians and Kenyans send money home instantly using mobile wallets and local bank accounts. We focus on the last‑mile integration that big players often overlook, stitching together mobile money APIs into a single API for businesses and diaspora apps.

WrenchLine is a SaaS platform that lets independent auto repair shops offer instant financing to their customers at the checkout. The loan is underwritten in seconds using shop data and the customer's vehicle history, letting the shop close more high‑ticket jobs without waiting for a bank approval.

ShiftPay gives warehouse crews on 3‑day contracts instant access to the portion of their earned wages they need, without the high‑interest payday loan traps. We plug directly into the payroll system of third‑party logistics firms and let workers withdraw earned pay as early as each shift.

ReguChain is a SaaS platform that continuously monitors crypto‑exchange activity for AML, KYC, and sanctions compliance. We feed the raw blockchain data into a real‑time risk engine that flags suspicious behavior and auto‑generates regulator‑ready reports.

BridgeFinance is a platform that aims to give recent immigrants a set of tools to help them manage their finances and get informal financial advice. We combine a simple dashboard with some educational content and a chat‑bot that pretends to be a personal advisor.

NestPlan builds a lightweight, plug‑and‑play pension automation platform for small businesses that lack HR headcount. Our SaaS layers on top of existing payroll providers, handling enrollment, contributions, compliance filings and employee dashboards with zero manual paperwork.

NestBudget is a mobile‑first budgeting app built for single parents who juggle childcare, work, and unpredictable cash flow. It auto‑categorises expenses, forecasts month‑end shortfalls and suggests concrete, time‑boxed savings actions that fit a tight household schedule.

PulsePay is a lightweight subscription billing platform built for boutique gyms that sell class packs, membership tiers, and drop‑in passes. We let studio owners set up recurring payments, manage member holds, and reconcile payouts without the overhead of enterprise systems.

PayFlow is a SaaS platform that automates vendor payment scheduling for mid‑size retailers. It syncs with existing ERP/PS systems, predicts optimal payment dates, and executes them automatically, freeing finance teams from manual spreadsheets.

GiveFlow is a platform that hooks into a company's payroll system and lets employees round‑up or donate a fixed amount of each paycheck to charities of their choice. We aim to make workplace giving frictionless and more visible within existing HR tools.

CoverLane is a marketplace that aggregates professional liability, equipment, and health insurance options for independent contractors and gig workers. We let users compare, customize, and buy policies in minutes, cutting through the jargon and the endless back‑and‑forth with carriers.

CoopLift is a cloud‑native platform that helps community‑owned credit unions replace legacy core systems with a modular, API‑first stack. We focus on the member experience—real‑time account opening, digital wallets, and open‑banking integrations—while keeping the back‑office compliant and secure.

EscrowMate is a cloud‑based platform that automates the escrow paperwork and fund transfers that real‑estate agents have to manage for each transaction. We integrate directly with title companies, lenders and county recorders so agents can close deals with a single click.

CauseCard is a corporate‑card platform built specifically for nonprofit organizations. It bundles a no‑fee Visa card with real‑time expense tracking, grant‑level reporting, and compliance tools so finance teams can spend and report in seconds, not days.

BankBridge is an open‑banking API platform that aims to give community banks a simple way to expose their data to third‑party apps. We think the tech should be plug‑and‑play and let smaller institutions join the data‑sharing trend without a lot of overhead.

VetPayLater offers a buy‑now‑pay‑later platform built for veterinary clinics, letting pet owners split treatment costs into interest‑free installments at checkout. We integrate directly with practice management software to automate approvals and repayment collection.

LedgerPOS is a cloud‑native accounting platform that plugs directly into any point‑of‑sale system. It automatically syncs sales, inventory and cash flow so small retailers can close their books with a few clicks, not spreadsheets.

We provide a handcrafted payment gateway for boutique luxury fashion houses that sell a handful of high‑ticket items cross‑border to the EU. Our platform handles currency conversion, VAT compliance and last‑mile settlement in a single API, so designers can focus on the runway, not the regulator.

KhetBank is a mobile‑first digital bank built for smallholder farmers and village merchants in rural India. We provide zero‑fee deposit accounts, micro‑loans, and cash‑in/cash‑out through a combination of USSD, simple smartphone apps, and a local agent network.

Taxify AI is a SaaS tool that tries to make sales‑tax calculations easier for online stores. We aim to pull together the different tax rules and give merchants a simple way to stay compliant without a lot of manual work.

ClearBill Health is a SaaS platform that automates and modernizes debt collection for hospitals and physician groups. We blend AI‑driven claim validation with a compliant multichannel outreach engine so providers can recover more money without alienating patients. The tool plugs into existing EHR and billing systems with a simple API.

GoalRewards turns everyday spending into a savings accelerator by attaching loyalty points to personal financial goals. Users earn points for every purchase, which automatically convert into micro‑deposits toward their chosen savings target, making the habit of saving feel like a game.

SwiftSettle is a white‑label payment layer that lets boutique marketplace sellers receive funds the instant a buyer’s payment clears, bypassing the typical 2‑5 day hold. We hook into the marketplace's checkout API and push the seller's net amount to their linked bank or prepaid card within seconds.

AirPulse Health delivers a connected, AI‑driven platform that continuously monitors lung function, activity, and environment for COPD patients at home. The data is streamed to clinicians in real time, triggering alerts before an exacerbation becomes a hospitalization.

CampusCare is a web‑based platform that tries to streamline how college students get routed to mental‑health resources. We aim to provide a quick “triage” questionnaire and then point users toward counseling, peer support, or emergency help.

NephroSync is a cloud‑based care‑coordination platform that links dialysis clinics, home health agencies, and insurers in a single, real‑time workflow. It automates appointment scheduling, lab result sharing, and discharge handoffs so patients spend less time stuck in administrative limbo.

ChartEase is an AI‑powered scribing platform that sits inside a solo doctor's electronic medical record and turns spoken patient encounters into clean, billable notes in real time. The system learns from each doctor’s style, so the output feels native and requires minimal editing.

AuthFlow is a SaaS platform that automates prior‑authorization (PA) workflows for small, regional health insurers. By pulling clinical data straight from EMR APIs and generating completion‑ready PA packets, we cut the average turnaround from days to minutes.

Infusio is a SaaS platform that coordinates home infusion therapy—scheduling nurses, managing inventory, and automating insurance billing—in real time. By linking patients, providers, and payers on a single secure dashboard we eliminate the paperwork and phone‑tag that currently stall treatment.

NutriBari is a mobile app that lets people who have had bariatric surgery log what they eat and get general guidance on meeting their nutritional needs. We’re building a simple dashboard that syncs with popular wearables and offers reminders to stay on track.

SilverEase is a SaaS platform that delivers personalized, sensor‑guided exercise programs and remote coaching for adults over 65 who suffer from chronic musculoskeletal pain. We combine wearable data, simple AI recommendations, and integration with existing EMR workflows to keep patients active and reduce reliance on medication.

We’ve built an on‑device AI that reads dental X‑rays and flags cavities, periodontal disease, and early lesions in seconds. The model runs on cheap hardware so clinics without a specialist can get a second opinion right after the scan.

RareMatch.ai is a SaaS platform that uses AI‑driven phenotypic profiling to connect patients with ultra‑rare disease diagnoses to the handful of clinical trials that actually exist for them. We automate the manual chart review and outreach that biotech sponsors currently do, cutting lead time from months to weeks.

RxOptics is a SaaS platform that gives self‑insured employers direct, real‑time control over their pharmacy benefit spend. Using AI to match patients to the lowest‑cost in‑network drugs and automatically negotiate rebates, we turn a black‑box PBM into a transparent cost‑saving engine.

KidTherapy Scheduler is a lightweight web platform that aims to simplify how pediatric therapy appointments are booked and managed. We’re trying to let parents, clinics and therapists keep their calendars in sync without a lot of back‑and‑forth.

OncoSecond is a tele‑oncology platform that connects cancer patients with board‑certified oncologists for a paid, on‑demand second opinion. We use a secure video portal and a curated knowledge base to streamline case review and deliver a written report within 72 hours.

SomniWell is a mobile-first digital therapeutic that delivers evidence‑based CBT‑I, sleep‑tracking, and AI‑personalized coaching to help adults overcome chronic insomnia. We combine clinically‑validated modules with real‑time data to adjust the program on the fly, aiming to replace costly sleep meds and endless doctor visits.

Maternix Pulse gives obstetric teams a continuous, at‑home monitoring solution for high‑risk pregnancies—think pre‑eclampsia, gestational diabetes, and placenta previa. A lightweight wearable streams vitals to a cloud AI that flags deterioration before the patient even feels sick, letting clinicians intervene early.

NavMed is an AI‑powered care‑navigation platform built for Medicaid members and their managing organizations. It delivers personalized, bilingual guidance—via SMS, voice calls, and a web portal—to help members schedule primary care, complete referrals, and avoid unnecessary ER visits.

FlexiCare is a platform that connects employees with physical therapists who specialize in musculoskeletal issues. We aim to make it easier for workplaces to offer some kind of on‑demand support for back, neck, and joint discomfort.

DischargeFlow is a SaaS platform that guides hospital case managers through the entire discharge planning workflow, from eligibility checks to post‑acute follow‑up. By surfacing real‑time bed availability and automating patient‑specific checklists, we aim to cut readmission risk without adding paperwork.

SeptoSense leverages continuous physiologic data streams from ICU monitors to run a proprietary, AI‑driven early‑warning algorithm for sepsis. The system flags at‑risk patients in real time and delivers actionable alerts directly to clinicians' dashboards.

DermRural AI is a low‑bandwidth tele‑dermatology platform that lets primary‑care nurses in remote clinics upload photos of skin lesions and receive board‑certified dermatologist reads within 24 hours. We combine a simple mobile app with an AI‑triage engine to prioritize urgent cases and keep referral costs down.

CareShift is a real‑time marketplace that connects per‑diem nurses with senior‑living communities that need shift coverage. Facilities post open shifts, vetted nurses accept them through a mobile app, and the platform handles compliance paperwork and payment.

ClinicShift is a lightweight service that helps small, independent clinics move their patient data from one EHR system to another. We aim to make the migration process less painful and more predictable for practices that don’t have big IT teams.

ValorMind is a mobile‑first platform that delivers evidence‑based therapy, peer‑to‑peer support, and benefits navigation specifically for U.S. military veterans coping with PTSD, depression, and transition stress. We bundle CBT lessons, guided meditation, and a moderated community into a single, VA‑compatible app.

Mindsight Care is a web‑and‑mobile platform that lets families of people living with dementia coordinate daily care, share real‑time updates, and access vetted professional support. Our AI‑driven dashboard surfaces warning signs and suggests activities to keep the person engaged, while a community hub connects caregivers to peer advice and licensed therapists.

SoundGuard is a cloud‑based hearing‑health platform built for aging workers in noisy industries. We combine a quick, smartphone‑enabled screening with AI‑driven risk alerts and personalized hearing‑protection recommendations, all integrated into a company’s existing occupational‑health workflow.

EquiScreen is a SaaS platform that embeds brief, evidence‑based social determinants of health (SDoH) screens into Medicaid member workflows and automatically routes actionable referrals to community resources. The system pulls real‑time data from local service providers to keep care teams informed of what support is actually available.

MindFlow is a cloud‑based platform that tries to streamline behavioral health intake by digitizing questionnaires and pre‑visit paperwork. We aim to let clinicians focus on care rather than admin, and give patients a smoother onboarding experience.

TheraNote is a SaaS platform that uses AI to turn a physical therapist's spoken session notes into compliant, billable documentation in seconds. We integrate with the major EMR systems used in outpatient PT clinics to auto‑populate treatment plans and progress notes.

We built a mobile app that delivers clinically validated postpartum depression screenings to new mothers during the first 12 weeks after birth, and instantly connects those at risk with tele‑therapy or local providers.

RecoverTrack is a lightweight, HIPAA‑compliant mobile platform that lets medication‑assisted treatment (MAT) clinics track daily opioid use‑recovery metrics for each patient and intervene before a relapse. It combines a simple self‑report UI with passive wear‑able data to give clinicians a real‑time compliance dashboard.

OncoComply is an AI‑driven compliance platform that monitors oncology billing in real time, flags coding errors and automates documentation to keep practices audit‑ready. It integrates with existing EMR/EHR and payer portals, delivering actionable insights without disrupting clinicians.

We are building a web‑based hub that tries to bring together doctors, specialty pharmacies and payers for patients with ultra‑rare diseases. The idea is to make the ordering and reimbursement process a little less painful for everyone involved.

CardioBridge offers a fully remote cardiac rehabilitation platform that combines wearable ECG monitoring, guided exercise videos, and weekly tele‑coach check‑ins. We aim to let post‑procedure patients complete the FDA‑recommended 12‑week program from home while staying compliant with their physicians.

CarePath AI is a web‑and‑mobile platform that guides patients through personalized advance care planning (ACP) conversations, captures legally‑valid directives, and syncs them directly into the health system’s EHR. We combine AI‑driven question flows with clinician dashboards to make ACP a routine part of outpatient visits.

PulmoSync is a connected inhaler platform that streams real‑time usage data to the physician’s dashboard and to a mobile app for patients and caregivers. The hardware is a low‑cost Bluetooth add‑on that plugs into any standard metered‑dose inhaler.

RadAIze is an AI‑driven workflow assistant that sits between the PACS and the radiologist’s reporting station. It triages studies, auto‑populates key findings and routes cases to the right subspecialist, letting radiologists focus on interpretation rather than paperwork.

MindPath is a mobile app that helps employees locate mental‑health resources within their company and the broader community. We aim to make the process of finding counseling, peer‑support groups, and wellness programs a little less confusing.

CareBridge Health is a tablet‑based care‑coordination platform that lets uninsured patients with chronic diseases log meds, vitals and receive remote nurse check‑ins. We embed free community‑resource directories and automate referrals to safety‑net clinics, aiming to keep patients out of the ER.

CareBridge AI is a SaaS platform that surface‑to‑action care gaps for Medicare Advantage (MA) plans in real time. By blending claims analytics, electronic health record data, and a simple outreach workflow, we give health plans the tools to close gaps before they turn into costly hospitalizations.

OperiSync is a lightweight SaaS platform that ties together scheduling, instrument inventory, and compliance checklists for small, independent ambulatory surgery centers. It replaces dozens of spreadsheet tabs and phone calls with a single, real‑time dashboard that staff can access from any device.

TrialReach is a mobile‑first platform that brings FDA‑compliant clinical trial participation to patients in rural and underserved areas, using secure video visits, on‑device biometrics, and a logistics network for home sample collection.

MediFlow is a cloud‑based tool that aims to make hospital supply chains a little smoother. We pull together data from different vendors and try to give managers a clearer view of what they need, when they need it.

PulseLoop is a lightweight SaaS platform that captures real‑time patient feedback at the point of care for ambulatory clinics. It plugs into existing EHRs and delivers a dashboard of actionable insights within hours of a visit.

We’ve built a compact, FDA‑cleared home sleep apnea testing kit that streams overnight data directly to a cloud platform for AI‑driven analysis. The device costs less than a night in a sleep lab and gives users a clear report and next‑step recommendations within 24 hours.

CycleMind AI uses a lightweight, explainable‑AI engine to automate claim edits and reimbursement forecasting for small behavioral health practices. We plug directly into existing practice management systems and surface the right coding tweaks in seconds.

DermaGuard is a HIPAA‑compliant remote monitoring platform that lets transplant centers track skin health of immunosuppressed patients via AI‑enhanced photo analysis. Patients capture weekly images with their phone; clinicians get automated risk scores and actionable alerts in their EMR.

RetinaSense AI is building a cloud‑based system that uses machine‑learning to flag possible diabetic retinopathy in retinal images. We aim to make it easy for eye clinics to get a quick second opinion without needing a specialist on site.

ImmuTrack is a mobile‑web platform that nudges transplant recipients to take their immunosuppressants on schedule and automatically logs doses for their care team. By combining smart reminders with real‑time adherence dashboards, we give clinicians the data they need to intervene before a rejection episode.

BuildSafe is a SaaS platform that gives construction firms real‑time visibility into worker safety, automates incident reporting and delivers on‑site training modules. We blend wearable data, AI risk scoring and compliance checklists to cut injury rates before they happen.

GeneBridge is a tele‑counseling platform that connects patients who carry rare inherited variants with board‑certified genetic counselors who specialize in those conditions. We embed a secure, HIPAA‑compliant video interface directly into the electronic health records of small specialty clinics, so the referral never leaves the workflow.

SummitSwap is a curated resale marketplace for premium outdoor gear—think high‑end backpacks, insulated jackets, and ultralight tents. We authenticate every item, guarantee condition, and ship within 48 hours so adventurers can gear up without paying full price or risking a bad buy.

LocalBite is an online marketplace that brings together small‑scale food artisans and the neighborhoods they serve. We aim to make it easier for people to discover and order handcrafted snacks, sauces, and baked goods from the people who make them.

NestGear is a curated rental platform that lets parents borrow high‑quality baby gear—cribs, strollers, high chairs, monitors, and more—by the month. We handle delivery, set‑up, cleaning, and returns, so families can keep their living spaces uncluttered and avoid the huge upfront cost of gear they outgrow in weeks.

We curate vintage apparel hand‑picked for Gen Z and sell it through a mobile‑first marketplace that mixes AI‑driven styling with community‑driven storytelling. Each piece is authenticated, photographed, and presented as a ready‑to‑wear look.

BoutiqConnect is a curated B2B wholesale marketplace that lets independent fashion boutiques source limited‑run pieces directly from small‑batch manufacturers. We handle the ordering, invoicing, and logistics so owners can spend more time curating windows and less time hunting for stock.

NestLease lets young professionals rent fully‑furnished, design‑forward rooms on a month‑to‑month basis. We handle delivery, assembly and swaps, so you can stage a stylish home without the upfront cost or the headache of moving bulky pieces.
LitBox is a monthly subscription service that delivers a handful of books hand‑picked by indie bookstores. We aim to connect readers with small shops they might never discover otherwise.

We run an online marketplace that connects independent ceramic artists with shoppers looking for unique, hand‑made pottery. By handling payments, shipping logistics and a curated storefront we let makers focus on their craft.

ChronoSwap is a peer‑to‑peer marketplace that lets collectors buy and sell pre‑owned luxury watches with built‑in authentication, escrow, and community‑driven pricing tools. We’ve built a mobile‑first experience that mirrors the thrill of a watch auction but removes the dealer markup.

ReTurnify is a SaaS platform that automates the end‑to‑end returns workflow for high‑margin DTC brands. We connect the shopper’s return portal, carrier logistics, and the brand’s ERP to cut manual handling and recover revenue where it matters most.

CoopCart is a web‑and‑mobile platform that lets neighbours and small offices pool their grocery orders to unlock wholesale prices on everyday staples. We handle the logistics, payment split, and delivery so buying in bulk feels like an everyday checkout.

BlkCommerce is a social‑shopping app aimed at helping Black‑owned businesses showcase their products in a community‑driven feed. We combine a lightweight storefront with social features so that shoppers can discover and buy directly within the platform. The idea is still early, but we think the mix of discovery and commerce will resonate.

KixVerify is a sneaker‑focused authentication and peer‑to‑peer trading platform. We combine a lightweight AI model with a small pool of vetted experts to certify shoes in under a minute, then let verified users list them on a curated marketplace.

We run a curated marketplace that ships hard‑to‑find specialty foods—from Korean gochujang to Peruvian quinoa snacks—to food lovers worldwide. Our platform aggregates small producers, handles compliance and cross‑border logistics, and lets customers discover authentic flavors with a few clicks.

Ink & Frame is a curated online marketplace that connects independent illustrators with buyers who want limited‑edition art prints for homes, offices, or boutique spaces. We handle production, fulfillment, and quality control so artists can focus on creating and collectors can buy with confidence.

RenewTech is a marketplace for pre‑loved smartphones, laptops and tablets that come with a factory‑backed 90‑day warranty. We certify, test and refurbish each unit in‑house, then ship it directly to the buyer with a hassle‑free return policy.

TeamTreats is an online platform that lets remote teams pick and send small gifts for birthdays, milestones, and informal celebrations. We try to make the process a bit easier by aggregating a few popular gift options in one place.

ThreadHive is a marketplace that lets micro‑influencers design and sell limited‑run apparel to their followers without holding inventory. We handle on‑demand printing, fulfillment and payments, so creators can focus on promotion and keep most of the margin.

AgriRent is a marketplace that lets farmers rent tractors, harvesters, and other high‑cost equipment from local owners on a short‑term basis. We handle the booking, insurance, and logistics so that growers can scale seasonal work without the capital outlay of buying a whole fleet.

Moss Meadow Boxes curates a weekly delivery of certified‑organic produce sourced directly from farms within a 30‑mile radius of the customer. We pack a seasonal mix of vegetables, herbs, and occasional fruit, along with a short farmer note that tells you who grew it and how.

EcoPack Market is an online marketplace that connects brands and retailers with vetted suppliers of sustainable packaging materials—biodegradable mailers, reusable containers, compostable fillers, and more. We make it as easy as buying a box of tape, but the product you get is climate‑positive.

KidLoop is a subscription service that delivers curated second‑hand kids clothing to families each month. We handle the sorting, washing and packaging so parents can just open the box and try the outfits on their kids.

LensLoop is a marketplace where photographers can rent high‑end camera bodies, lenses and lighting gear from vetted owners on short‑term terms. We handle insurance, pickup logistics and a reliability score so renters don’t have to guess whether the gear will work.

BidNest is a live‑stream auction platform that lets estate sale managers showcase items in real time to a nationwide audience of collectors and dealers. Sellers get a virtual “room” where each piece is presented by a professional host, and bidders can join from any device with a single click.

PrintForge is a niche marketplace that lets tabletop‑gaming hobbyists order custom‑designed, paint‑ready miniatures printed on demand by a vetted network of local 3‑D printers. We handle everything from file validation to quality‑checked shipping so players get unique figures fast, without the usual overseas lead times.

Rooted Ritual delivers clinically‑backed, herb‑first daily supplements straight to consumers on a flexible subscription. We blend traditional botanicals with modern dosage science and ship the exact dose you need each month, so you never guess or run out.

AromaLoop is a subscription service that sends curated luxury perfume samples each month so people can try high‑end fragrances without buying a full bottle. We aim to make the discovery experience feel more personal and less intimidating.

RootBridge is a cross‑border marketplace that connects diaspora shoppers with trusted food importers in their home countries. We curate authentic staples—spices, snacks, and specialty ingredients—and ship them directly to urban consumers worldwide.

LiquidLoop is a B2B marketplace where brands can list excess returns and overstock for quick resale to vetted liquidators and resale channels. We handle inspection, grading, and logistics so brands can turn waste into revenue without lifting a finger.

GearSwap Pro is a curated online marketplace where serious amateur athletes and small sports programs can buy and sell certified pre‑owned equipment – from carbon‑fiber road bikes to high‑end ski sets. Every listing is inspected by an independent certification partner, so buyers know exactly what they’re getting and sellers can command a fair price.

BrewBox Club delivers a curated selection of 6–8 small‑batch craft beers to subscribers each month, hand‑picked by our AI‑driven taste‑profile engine. We partner directly with independent breweries to bring rare releases straight to consumers’ doors, removing the guesswork of discovery.
LocalWood is a simple online marketplace that showcases furniture made by local craftsmen. We let shoppers browse a curated selection of pieces and place orders directly through our site.

VerdantBox delivers a curated house‑plant each month together with a personalized care guide and optional on‑demand video check‑ins. We aim to turn the excitement of a new plant into a lasting habit, not a wilted disappointment.

PixelThreads is a curated marketplace that lets indie game studios sell officially licensed merch directly to their fans – everything from hoodies and enamel pins to limited‑edition art books. We handle production, fulfillment and branding so devs can focus on making games.

FitLease is a curated marketplace that lets boutique fitness trainers and small studios rent high‑quality equipment (treadmills, rowers, kettlebells, etc.) on a month‑to‑month basis. We handle delivery, setup, and maintenance so owners can swap gear as fast as their class schedule changes.

GemCraft Market is an online marketplace that connects independent jewelry artisans with shoppers looking for one‑of‑a‑kind, handmade pieces. We handle the storefront, payments, and shipping logistics so creators can focus on design, while buyers get curated, authentic products with a story behind each item.

EcoDrop Hub is an online marketplace that connects small dropshippers with customers looking for more sustainable products. We aim to make it easier for anyone to find greener options without having to stock inventory themselves.

LumiShade is an online marketplace that curates and sells beauty products created by under‑represented ethnic brands, from South‑Asian skincare to Afro‑Caribbean hair care. We handle sourcing, compliance, and logistics so shoppers can discover authentic products in one place.

RetroNest is a curated online marketplace that connects vintage homeware collectors with shoppers looking for authentic mid‑century pieces, hand‑picked for condition and style. We handle authentication, photography, and shipping so sellers can focus on sourcing and buyers can trust what they’re getting.

We ship vet‑formulated, breed‑specific meal kits for dogs with chronic dietary needs. Each month a fresh, ready‑to‑serve bag arrives at the door, designed to manage skin sensitivities, joint health, or weight issues while still tasting great.

RuralCart is a co‑op buying platform that aggregates demand from small farming communities and negotiates bulk prices with regional wholesalers. Users place orders together, split the delivery cost, and receive farm‑supplies, groceries and hardware at prices normally only large retailers see.

We build ultra‑compact temperature‑and‑humidity data loggers that plug directly into the standard 2‑inch IBC caps used by specialty pharma shippers. The devices store high‑resolution data for up to 30 days and upload automatically when docked at the receiving warehouse.

CardioPulse builds a single‑use, Bluetooth‑enabled 12‑lead ECG patch that sticks to the chest and streams real‑time rhythm data to a physician’s dashboard. The device is designed for ambulatory patients who need continuous cardiac monitoring but can’t access a hospital‑grade Holter.

We develop acoustic emission (AE) sensors that can be mounted on rotating equipment to listen for early signs of wear. The data is streamed to a cloud service where simple alerts are generated. Our goal is to give plant managers a low‑maintenance way to spot problems before they cause a shutdown.

LivestockPulse builds rugged, solar‑powered collars that stream heart‑rate, temperature and activity data from cattle to a cloud dashboard. The system lets producers spot illness or stress early, reducing veterinary costs and improving herd productivity.

We’ve built a plug‑and‑play smart thermostat that can be retrofitted onto the outdated HVAC controls common in pre‑2000 apartment blocks. The device learns occupancy patterns without any resident interaction and reports energy use back to property managers via a simple dashboard.

We are building a thin, adhesive patch that continuously measures interstitial glucose and streams the data to your smartphone. It’s designed for health‑conscious athletes who want to fine‑tune nutrition and performance without the hassle of lab tests.

We build an autonomous seed‑planting robot designed for farms under 200 ha. The machine drives the rows, places each seed at a prescribed depth and spacing, and syncs to a cloud dashboard that lets farmers monitor progress in real time.

We build compact micro‑wind turbines that can be mounted on a small pole or roof and hooked up to an off‑grid home’s battery system. The idea is to give remote households a bit of extra clean power without needing a full‑scale wind farm.

BoxLink builds connected, lockable tool chests that automatically track each tool via RFID and Bluetooth, feeding real‑time inventory data to a simple mobile dashboard. We aim to give contractors visibility into tool usage, prevent loss, and cut down on downtime without requiring a whole‑site IT overhaul.

BinSense builds rugged ultrasonic fill‑level sensors that retrofit onto existing municipal waste bins and push real‑time data to a cloud dashboard. The goal is to help cities cut collection costs and reduce overflow complaints by only dispatching trucks when bins are actually full.

SunMesh builds rugged, solar‑powered Wi‑Fi routers that self‑organize into a mesh network, giving first‑responders connectivity in the hours after a disaster. The units are lightweight, can be set up by one person, and keep running for days on a built‑in battery charged by a fold‑out solar panel.

SunGuard builds a lightweight, wrist‑worn UV exposure tracker that logs real‑time UV dose and pushes alerts to workers and supervisors. The data syncs to a cloud dashboard where safety managers can monitor compliance, generate reports, and intervene before dangerous exposure levels are reached.
BakeForge is building a tabletop 3D printer that can turn dough into custom shapes on demand. We think it could help bakeries add a bit of novelty to their product lines without huge retooling.

FinSense builds a compact sensor that snaps onto any fishing rod and streams real‑time bite detection, depth, and line‑tension data to a mobile app. Anglers can review the data after each trip to improve technique and increase catch rates.

CureSense builds wireless sensor nodes that embed in fresh concrete and stream real‑time temperature and humidity data to a cloud dashboard. The system lets site engineers verify that curing schedules are being met, reducing rework and schedule risk.

ClarityBot builds autonomous, battery‑operated window‑cleaning robots designed specifically for 5‑ to 12‑story glass‑front buildings. The units mount to the façade, navigate using lidar and edge‑detection, and perform a full wash‑and‑dry cycle without any human on a ladder.

DiagPlug builds a handheld OBD‑II plug that syncs to a cloud‑based diagnostic platform, giving independent shop owners instant access to factory‑level trouble codes, live sensor data, and step‑by‑step repair guides without expensive OEM subscriptions.

PulseGuard is a wrist‑worn sensor that aims to give first‑responders some real‑time insight into their stress levels. We’re still prototyping the hardware and a very simple mobile app that shows a stress score.

PickGlove builds a lightweight, hands‑free barcode scanner that snaps onto a picker’s glove and streams data directly to the WMS. The goal is to shave seconds off each pick without the awkward pistol‑style scanners that slow people down.

ParcelGuard is a plug‑and‑play sensor that snaps onto any standard mailbox and instantly notifies you when a package lands inside. It uses low‑power BLE to talk to your phone and can also integrate with smart home hubs for voice alerts.

FermentGuard is a compact, Wi‑Fi‑enabled sensor that continuously monitors temperature, pH, and CO₂ levels in home fermentation jars. The data streams to a simple mobile app that alerts users when conditions drift out of the target range, helping hobbyists hit consistent flavor profiles without costly trial‑and‑error.

HydraSense builds a discreet, AI‑powered wristband that continuously monitors hydration levels in seniors and alerts caregivers via a smartphone app. The device combines bio‑impedance sensing with skin temperature to predict dehydration up to 4 hours before symptoms appear.

We make a plug‑and‑play buoy that you can drop off the coast and it will collect water quality data and send it to the cloud. The idea is to give users a simple way to keep an eye on the ocean without having to send a research vessel out every day.

FeedWell is a Wi‑Fi enabled pet feeder that dispenses portion‑controlled meals and logs weight, activity and eating patterns in a companion app. We blend a low‑cost dispenser with a simple health‑tracking algorithm so owners can spot appetite changes before they become a problem.

AirPulse builds a lightweight, battery‑powered air compressor that streams real‑time pressure, usage, and maintenance data to a companion mobile app. The device is designed for contractors, landscapers, and DIY enthusiasts who need a reliable source of compressed air on the go, without the hassle of cords or manual service logs.

ChillGuard is a plug‑and‑play temperature‑monitoring sensor that mounts on commercial walk‑in coolers and freezers. When the temperature drifts outside a pre‑set band, it sends an instant push notification to a manager’s phone and logs a compliance report for health inspections.

Roots Kitchen Network builds a shared‑infrastructure platform for regional food brands that want to scale without the capital‑intensive burden of opening physical locations. We lease, outfit and manage ghost‑kitchen sites across secondary markets, and provide a single API that routes orders from every major delivery platform to the right brand.

BulkFuel is a meal‑prep delivery service that aims to make high‑protein, calorie‑dense meals convenient for bodybuilders who train hard and eat a lot. We pack everything you need to hit your macros without having to cook every day.

SnackWell delivers a curated, nutritionally balanced snack box to offices on a weekly cadence, aiming to replace the vending‑machine bulk of sugary treats with healthier options that still feel indulgent. We partner with corporate wellness programs to track engagement and adjust the mix based on employee preferences.

GutHarvest is a small‑batch fermented foods brand creating probiotic‑rich sauces, pickles, and beverages that are designed to support gut health without sacrificing flavor. We source local vegetables and use traditional fermentation techniques, then add clinically‑backed probiotic strains to each product.

HalalBox delivers chef‑crafted, ready‑to‑cook meal kits that are 100 % certified halal and tailored to the tastes of modern Muslim professionals. Each kit arrives with pre‑portioned ingredients, step‑by‑step recipes, and a QR code linking to a short video walkthrough.

ZeroPlate is a B2B marketplace that connects restaurants with vetted suppliers of surplus, imperfect, and upcycled ingredients, turning food waste into menu profit. We automate ordering, provide real‑time inventory data, and bundle logistics so chefs can source zero‑waste ingredients as easily as they do staples.

HarvestGather is an online marketplace that aims to connect farms with corporate event planners who want a "farm‑to‑table" feel for their meetings and gatherings. We provide a platform where restaurants and farms can list menu options and companies can book catering with a focus on freshness.

AllerBite partners with K‑12 schools to provide fully allergy‑safe lunches, using a centralized kitchen and a real‑time digital ordering system. Parents and administrators get a simple way to guarantee that every child’s dietary restrictions are honored without extra paperwork.

We source single‑origin coffee directly from smallholder farms in Ethiopia, Colombia and Guatemala, then ship curated 100‑gram bags to subscribers each month. The service includes farm‑level impact stories so customers know exactly who their coffee is supporting.

BrewMinder ships a monthly, all‑in‑one kombucha brewing kit designed for the ultra‑busy professional who wants to make small‑batch, probiotic‑rich drinks at home without the hassle of sourcing SCOBYs, tea, and flavorings separately. Each box includes pre‑measured ingredients, a reusable glass fermenter, and step‑by‑step video guides tailored to a 1‑litre batch.

DormBite delivers chef‑crafted, pre‑portioned cooking kits that fit inside a standard dorm fridge and microwave. Each kit contains everything a student needs to make a healthy, tasty meal in under 15 minutes, without any waste or extra shopping trips.

We make small‑batch, artisanal sauces and condiments aimed at food‑obsessed people who like to experiment with flavor. Our lineup includes a smoky chipotle marmalade, a fermented exotic mustard, and a few other rotating “limited‑edition” products.

MoyoBites makes chef‑crafted, frozen African dishes that you can pop in the microwave and feel right at home. We focus on the most requested staples from West, East and Central Africa, and ship them to diaspora households across the US and UK.

HerbFusion Foods creates plant‑based protein blends specifically formulated for classic Asian dishes—think mapo tofu, ramen broth, and satay marinades. Our ingredients mimic the texture and umami of meat while staying clean, soy‑free, and locally sourced.

Kilted Kegs curates a monthly subscription box of craft beers from micro‑breweries in the Pacific Northwest that ship directly to the door of the same‑day‑delivery office crowd in Seattle. Each box includes two 12‑oz bottles, tasting notes, and a QR code that unlocks a short video from the brewer.

We ship handcrafted, human‑grade treats for dogs and cats on a monthly subscription. Each box is curated by a chef‑pet nutritionist, uses limited‑edition, locally‑sourced ingredients, and arrives ready to serve. Pets get a surprise menu every month, and owners get the peace of mind that comes with transparent nutrition.

BlueWave Coop is a community‑supported fishery platform that connects local fishermen with city‑dwelling diners. We aim to make sustainable seafood more accessible by letting people sign up for regular deliveries or occasional pickups.

Seasoned Box ships a monthly selection of small‑batch, globally sourced spice blends with a single, chef‑tested recipe each. The goal is to give home cooks the confidence to try new flavors without having to hunt the grocery aisle for obscure ingredients.

BlendBox delivers ready‑to‑drink, nutrient‑balanced smoothies straight to office desks, using locally sourced produce and a rotating menu of functional blends. We focus on the 9‑to‑5 crowd that wants a healthy boost without leaving their workstation.

Timpla Street brings authentic Filipino street‑food staples—islaw, betamax, taho, and more—to pop‑up stalls and a small‑batch delivery service in select US cities. We focus on the flavors that grew up in Manila’s laneways, prepared by native cooks and served fresh to the Filipino diaspora and adventurous eat‑outs.

MycoMend delivers lab‑verified, whole‑food mushroom complexes in vegan capsules that boost focus, immunity and recovery. We combine clinically studied strains with a transparent supply chain so customers know exactly what they’re taking.

SauceRoute is an online platform that lets users order regional barbecue sauces from small‑batch producers and have them shipped directly to their door. We aim to be the go‑to marketplace for discovering and trying unique, locally‑crafted sauces without leaving home.

MithaiMitra is an online platform that partners with family‑run sweet shops across metro India to deliver freshly‑made, authentic Indian mithai to homes and offices on demand. We handle the logistics and packaging, letting artisans focus on what they do best – making sweets.

NutriPlate is a SaaS platform that lets schools design, deliver, and track compliant lunches in real time. Parents can see exactly what their kids ate, any allergens, and nutritional breakdown, while administrators get reporting that satisfies district health mandates.

PantryPilot delivers bulk‑size dry staples (rice, beans, pasta, flour) in compact, resealable containers to high‑rise apartments where storage is at a premium. We bundle the order, carry it up to the floor, and leave the items in a discreet, stackable pantry box.

NutriFitBox delivers chef‑crafted, macro‑precise meals that adapt to each athlete’s training load, recovery schedule, and personal taste. Our platform combines a quick intake questionnaire with a proprietary AI engine to generate weekly menus that are shipped fresh to a door.
We make small‑batch, handcrafted hot sauces that blend unconventional flavors from around the world. Our sauces are sold online and at a few local markets.

CrumbClub is a subscription service that delivers fresh sourdough loaves from vetted local bakeries straight to members' doors each week. We handle the logistics and quality vetting so bakers can focus on baking and customers get a consistently good loaf without hunting the market.

NutriDesk is an AI‑powered platform that designs weekly corporate cafeteria menus and on‑site ordering experiences that automatically respect every employee’s dietary restrictions, allergy profiles, and corporate wellness goals.

Olive Muse is a curated subscription service that brings micro‑batch, single‑estate olive oils from family‑run groves in Italy, Spain and Greece straight to the kitchen. Each month we ship a 250 ml bottle with tasting notes, harvest data and a short story about the grower, so customers know exactly where their oil comes from.

Cyclice curates a quarterly box of limited‑edition, seasonal cheeses sourced directly from small‑batch artisan creameries. Each box includes tasting notes, pairing suggestions, and a short story about the farm, letting cheese lovers discover fresh, hyper‑local varieties they’d otherwise miss.
We put together weekly meal kits that are supposed to help new moms recover after childbirth. The meals are balanced, easy to heat, and claim to support lactation and overall energy.

PaceFuel makes high‑protein, low‑glycemic snack bars engineered for endurance athletes who need steady fuel on long rides, runs, or swims. Our bars blend whey isolate, pea protein, and slow‑release carbs from quinoa and tapioca, with no artificial sweeteners.

ZeroPlate is a SaaS platform that connects restaurant kitchens with a real‑time dashboard to track, analyze, and act on food waste. By integrating with POS and inventory systems we give chefs and managers the data they need to cut waste without sacrificing menu quality.

We curate and ship a monthly selection of small‑batch heirloom grains—spelt, einkorn, red quinoa, emmer, and the like—directly to home cooks who want authentic flavors and know the story behind each seed. Each box includes recipe cards, provenance notes, and optional milling services.

CampusBite is a SaaS platform that lets corporate campuses schedule, manage, and sell food‑truck meals to their employees. Employees browse the daily truck lineup, pre‑order, and pay through a single mobile app, while campus admins get a live dashboard to track orders and logistics.

Caterly is a cloud‑based platform that lets wedding planners keep track of catering orders, menus and vendor communications in one place. We aim to make the back‑office side of wedding food planning a little less chaotic.

GoldenPlate delivers chef‑crafted, nutritionally‑balanced meals straight to seniors’ doors, with options tailored to common dietary restrictions and taste preferences. We combine a simple ordering app with a modest logistics network to make healthy eating hassle‑free for older adults and their caregivers.

ShakeFit builds ready‑to‑drink, gym‑optimized protein shakes and delivers them straight to the locker rooms of partner fitness clubs. We handle formulation, cold‑chain logistics and a subscription interface so members never run out of a shake that matches their workout plan.

SariSarap delivers ready‑to‑cook Filipino‑Asian fusion meal kits that let busy professionals in the Pacific Northwest recreate the comfort dishes they grew up with, without hunting for obscure ingredients. Each kit contains pre‑portioned, sustainably sourced components and a 10‑minute recipe card that blends classic Filipino flavors with modern Asian twists.

GlucoChef delivers chef‑crafted, diabetes‑optimized meals straight to the door, using a simple weekly subscription. Each dish is nutritionally engineered to keep post‑meal glucose spikes under 30 mg/dL while tasting like a restaurant plate.

BeeLocal is an online marketplace that connects local honey producers with consumers who want to buy honey directly from the source. We aim to make the process of finding and ordering artisanal honey easier, while giving small beekeepers a digital storefront.

Comfortably Vegan delivers ready‑to‑heat, plant‑based versions of classic comfort dishes—mac & cheese, fried chicken, and shepherd’s pie—using clean, minimal‑ingredient formulations. We ship frozen meals in 4‑week batches so busy vegans (and flexitarians) can stock their freezer with guilt‑free nostalgia without the hassle of cooking from scratch.

LabelWise is a SaaS platform that automates nutrition label generation for independent and chain restaurants, syncing menu changes in real‑time with local compliance rules. Our AI parses recipes, calculates macro‑nutrients and produces printable labels that pass state inspections.

CakePatch is a hyper‑local marketplace that connects parents looking for a uniquely themed birthday cake with vetted home bakers who can deliver on the same day. We handle the ordering, payment and logistics so families can focus on the party, not the frosting.
We ship curated, ready‑to‑mix alcohol‑free cocktail kits to your door each month, giving you bar‑quality mocktails without the hassle of hunting for rare ingredients or figuring out recipes.

PastaBox is a subscription service that ships fresh, hand‑made pasta from small Italian‑American makers straight to your door. We aim to give busy people a convenient way to enjoy restaurant‑quality pasta at home without the hassle of cooking from scratch.

ShiftBite delivers hot, nutritionally‑balanced meals to night‑shift workers exactly when they need them, using a network of temperature‑controlled lockers located at hospitals, factories and 24‑hour campuses. We handle the timing, the prep, and the logistics so employees don’t have to grab a vending‑machine snack.

BiteBloom creates nutritionally balanced, fresh baby meals that are customized to each child's age, taste preferences, and any dietary restrictions. Parents order through our app and receive a weekly box of pre‑portioned purees and finger foods delivered to their door.

TasteTrail is a boutique marketplace that lets niche travelers—especially food‑focused photographers and culinary bloggers—book curated, off‑the‑beaten‑path food tours in a handful of culturally rich cities. We hand‑screen every host and match tours to very specific interests (e.g., street‑food night markets, family‑run spice workshops, or historic bakery walks).
